titleStmt.title: SII 15.27: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 27. (B.K. No. 24 of 1927-28.) RĀJŪR, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone leaning against the front wall of the Hanumān temple.

This is dated the 7th regnal year of the king, Raktākshi, Pushya-pūrṇimā, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1144, A.D. December 11, Monday, f.d.t. °17. The Saṅkramaṇa occurred on December 25.

It registers a gift of income from the Pannāya cess made by Heggaḍe Chandapayya, the Kēṇikāra of the Pannāya cess of Kūṁṭige and Rājavūr for worship, offerings, etc., to the god Mūlasthāna of Rājavūr. The gift was entrusted into the hands of Chandrabhūshaṇa-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple. It is stated that Ānandadaṇḍanāyaka, brother-in-law of Daṇḍanāyaka Bāchayya who held the office of Achchupannāyad-adhishṭhāyaka, was in charge of the Pannāya of the [Bā]hattaraṭhāṇa, under the orders of the Mahāpradhāna, Pasāyita, Maneverggaḍe, Haḍapavaḷa and Daṇḍanāyaka Bammaṇayya. The last named officer also bore the titles, Mahāsāmantādhipati and Mahāprachaṇḍa-daṇḍanāyaka and was holding the offices of Antahpurādhyaksha, Karituragasāhaṇi, Hēri-Kannaḍa-sandhivigrahi, Śrīkaraṇa and Sēnādhipati. The inscription is partly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī Ōṁ jayantyāviskṟitaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ da
kṣiṇōṁnnatedaṁṣṭāgraviśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī pṛthvī
vallabha mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīma
jjagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṟi
ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
kalyāṇada nelavīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyutta
mire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda ma
hā sāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīmadanta
®purādhyakṣaṁ karitureyasāhaṇi perggaḍe hērikannaḍasandivigra
hi śrīkaraṇaṁ sēnādhipati nāmādisamastaprasastisahi
taṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ pasāyitaṁ manaveggaḍe haḍapavaḷa
daṁṇḍanāyakaṁ bammaṇayyaṁgaḷe besadiṁ bhattavēṁThe paṁnnasa
daleyaccu pannāyadadhaṣṭhāyakaṁ śrīmaddaṇḍanāyakaṁ
bācayyaṁgaḷa maydunaṁ . surarājādyaṣṭadikupāḷakavinamitapādā
raviṁdaṁ bha parivi tōttuṁga kaḷe vakṣastha
ḷaṁ sindhura rvvadiṁ nāgēśva
radēvaṁ dēva vena ninagānandadaṁṇḍādhināthā . saṁ
vina dānakkaṁ parahitadoḷu rāmanaṁ vīradoḷā naraniṁdaṁ vi
dharayoḷagānaṁdadēva śrīmaddaṇḍanāya
kaṁ Ānandadēvarasaru bāhattara�ṇada pannāyamaṁ sukhadi
nāḷuttumire . gadiṁ kūṁṭige rājavūrada pannāyada ka(kē)ṇikā
raṁ heggaḍe caṁdapayyanāyakaru svasti śrīmaccāḷukya pratāpacakra vartti
śrīmajjagadēkamallavarpada 7 neya raktākṣi saṁvatsarada pusya(ṣya)da pu
ṇṇami sōmavāradaṁduttarāyaṇa parvvanimittavāgi
rājavūra śrī śvayaṁbhu mūlasthāna dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ dhūpadīpanivē
dyakkaṁ jīrṇnōdhārakkaveṁdu Ā vāḷeya tōṭada paṁnnāyada
suṁkamanalliyācāryya caṁdrabhūśaṇapaṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvva
kaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru . [Alliya] taṁbuliga sāsirvvarumiḻdu
hēṟige vīsavaṁ biṭṭaru . I dharṁmmamanāvanuṁ pratipāḷisi
davargga vāraṇāsi kurukṣētravargghyatīrtthadalu śahasra kavile
yaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ratnadalu khaciyisi vēdapāragarappa
Idanaḷida mahāpātakaṁge Ā tīrtthaṁgaḷa
ymuṁ brāhmaṇa
Digital edition of SII 15.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
